content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based strength across PSU banks, power, pharma and FMCG with multiple names gapping up sharply today, but VIX at 18.76 is elevated and several names are extended near 52-week highs heading into binary earnings events (AXISBANK Apr 25, AUBANK Apr 25, PIRAMALFIN Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30). Book is already 74% deployed with -0.27% unrealized; per hysteresis rule, default disposition is risk management on existing book rather than new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 81.50, CMP 78.49. Strong Q4 (PAT +35% YoY), broker TP Rs 90, but stock pulled back from 52w high 79.84 intraday. Setting SL at 74 (~9% from entry, below Apr-13 swing low 67.82 buffer — actually tighter at recent consolidation) and target 88 near HDFC Sec target. RR ~1.4 from CMP acceptable given strong fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 920.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (GNPA<1% first time), ICICI Sec upgrade to Buy TP 1350. Held position barely positive. Placing SL at 920 (below Apr-20 close 906.75 is too loose; 920 is below today's low 981 buffer zone — using 920 as protective stop ~7% from entry). Target 1100 near recent resistance band."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Small -0.8% drawdown acceptable given macro uncertainty (VIX 18.76, geopolitics). Gold ETF held as portfolio hedge — no SL trigger needed for hedging allocation of this size."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1650, CMP 1689, +2.4%. Nabha Power CCI approved; at 52w high. Trail SL to 1580 (below Apr-20 close 1606 swing zone), target 1850 toward consensus 2000-2300 band. Lock in near-breakeven protection on a stock gapping into earnings event risk in May."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1412.94, CMP 1406.50. Bought into +9.5% post-earnings spike — classic chase that gave back gains. At 70-80x P/E with limited re-rating room. Setting tight SL 1340 (below prior resistance-turned-support zone ~1340-1380) and modest target 1500. Would prefer to exit on any bounce but leaving MODIFY in place."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 990.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 25) — binary event risk. Strong provisional business update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). SL 990 (below Apr-20 close 997 and 1000 psychological), target 1140 near broker TPs. Tight risk management given earnings event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "new_target": 770.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 681, CMP 684.75. Q4 results Apr 29. Strong Q3 (+27.7% PAT), ICICI Direct BUY TP 770. SL 645 (below EMA9 645.74 / SMA20 625 zone), target 770. RR ~2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 2372, CMP 2368.90 flat. Q4 Apr 30. Chased into +6.5% FMCG spike. SL 2270 (below yesterday's Apr-20 close 2231 buffer — using 2270 as tighter stop below today's low 2336), target 2520. Earnings event risk — if Nestle's bar too high, HUL disappoints, want SL protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 440.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 404.50, CMP 402.25, slightly negative. Power sector leader, summer demand tailwind, Q4 May 15. SL 385 (below SMA20 377.98 / recent Apr-13 swing 374), target 440 toward consensus 12M band. RR ~1.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 0,
      "new_target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL the open BUY 230x ADANIPOWER LIMIT 214 from yesterday. Power cluster already concentrated (TORNTPOWER held, NTPC held). Adding a third power name at +7.53% day with ADANIENSOL also in watchlist would violate cluster discipline (>20% combined power exposure). Thesis has deteriorated — cancel rather than let it fill."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamentals + broker upgrade; hold with SL 74 protecting against momentum reversal after 66% run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 920.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print and ICICI Sec upgrade; SL 920 protects ~7% of capital on position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge allocation; normal pullback within range."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high; trail to protect gains and near-breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Chased post-earnings spike; tight stop given extreme valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 990.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 in 2 days — tight SL ahead of binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 645.00,
      "reasoning": "Pharma leader; SL below key MAs ahead of Apr 29 earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "reasoning": "Chased FMCG spike; tight stop ahead of Apr 30 earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Power sector tailwind; SL below SMA20."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA: Buyback at 1475 through Apr 29 creates near-term floor but current CMP 1442 already near buyback price — limited edge. Watch for retrace to 1380-1400 for better RR. ADANIENSOL: Q4 board meeting TODAY — avoid entry on results-day gap-up; revisit post-results. PIRAMALFIN: Apr 27 earnings — wait for event to pass. DEEPAKNTR: Prabhudas REDUCE TP 1354 below CMP 1723 — avoid, caught in gap-up short-squeeze. ELECON/TRITURBINE: skipping — unclear catalysts, avoid chasing 18%/volume anomalies blind. AXISBANK: Apr 25 Q4 — await. HCLTECH: -10.5% post-earnings; falling knife, avoid.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book 74% deployed with 9 open positions, many opened today chasing gap-ups. Critical to stop adding here — hysteresis rule triggered. Priority shifted to risk management: every position now has SL/target defined. Key concentrations: 3 earnings events next week (AUBANK Apr 25, AXISBANK context, PIRAMALFIN Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, NESTLEIND already out). FMCG cluster (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) and financials cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) near cluster caps. Cancelling pending ADANIPOWER order — power cluster already has TORNTPOWER+NTPC, adding a third would breach discipline. NO new entries today; focus is on SL discipline and letting positions breathe into their catalysts."
}
